name: The Young Virtues!! :3 |Myos|
description:
‘Pff, Me? Take Care Of FIVE Kids?’

‘Please Say Sike.’

So basically, You can be whatever, a cookie made to care for them, or a witch or whatever. These are the names for the young virtues, Blueberry Milk Cookie, Sweet Sugar Cookie, Tempered Spice Cookie, Enchanted Flour Cookie, and Savoury Salt Cookie.
